about.title: Gioi thieu
about.subtitle: Hebei Zhenyang Electric Technology Co., Ltd. la doanh nghiep tu nhan tap trung vao thiet bi dien, phu kien duong day dien va san pham phu tro.
about.profileTitle: Nha san xuat thiet bi dien co dinh huong thuc te
about.profileBody: Hebei Zhenyang Electric Technology Co., Ltd. duoc thanh lap ngay 12 thang 1 nam 2017. Cong ty chuyen san xuat thiet bi va linh kien dien, dong thoi phat trien san pham dien moi, cung cap dich vu ky thuat, cung ung san pham va ho tro du an. Voi von dang ky 36 trieu nhan dan te, cong ty xay dung he thong quan ly theo dinh huong chat luong va cung cap san pham phu hop cho cac ung dung cong trinh dien.
points: Thanh lap nam 2017, von dang ky 36 trieu nhan dan te.
Linh vuc kinh doanh gom R&D san pham dien, dich vu ky thuat va cung ung san pham.
Co tai lieu nang luc doanh nghiep va he thong quan ly chat luong.
Danh muc san pham tap trung vao nhu cau thuc te cua du an duong day phan phoi.
about.credentialsTitle: Ho so nang luc doanh nghiep
about.credentialsLead: Cac trang duoi day duoc chon tu catalogue cong ty, the hien chung nhan, he thong quan ly va danh hieu doanh nghiep de khach hang tham khao.

credentials.title: Chung nhan doanh nghiep
credentials.description: Chung nhan he thong quan ly va tai lieu tin dung nha cung cap trong catalogue.

credentials.title: Danh hieu doanh nghiep
credentials.description: Danh hieu, bang sang che va cac tai lieu cong nhan lien quan trong catalogue.

certificates.title: Chung nhan
certificates.subtitle: Ho so nang luc, chung nhan he thong quan ly, tai lieu tin dung nha cung cap va danh hieu doanh nghiep de khach hang tham khao.
certificates.heading: Tai lieu cho mua sam du an
certificates.body: Catalogue cong ty bao gom chung nhan he thong quan ly, tai lieu tin dung nha cung cap, giay phep san xuat, bang sang che, giai thuong chat luong va cac danh hieu lien quan. Trang nay hien thi ban xem truoc ve nang luc va danh hieu. Ban scan chung nhan, thoi han hieu luc va tai lieu cung ung du an co the duoc cung cap theo yeu cau khi trao doi.
highlights: Chung nhan quan ly chat luong, moi truong va an toan suc khoe nghe nghiep
Tai lieu tin dung nha cung cap, kinh doanh uy tin va dich vu chat luong
Giay phep san xuat, bang sang che va tai lieu ban quyen phan mem
Giai thuong chat luong, thanh tuu ky thuat va danh hieu doanh nghiep
certificates.previewLead: Hai trang duoi day duoc chon tu catalogue san pham cho thi truong Viet Nam, the hien nang luc va danh hieu doanh nghiep. Khach hang co the yeu cau file chung nhan ro net khi gui yeu cau.

items.name: Kep neo day dan
items.summary: Ma tham khao: NXJG-4, NXL-4, NLL-4.
items.features: Luc kep on dinh, lap dat hieu qua, phu hop duong day phan phoi ngoai troi.
items.material: Than hop kim nhom, tuy ma dung ket cau nem tu khoa hoac bat bulong.
items.application: Dung cho co dinh dau cuoi, doan neo va bao tri duong day cach dien tren khong 10kV.
items.customers: Phu hop du an luoi phan phoi Viet Nam, nha thau EPC va nha phan phoi vat tu dien.
items.details: Ma cuoi cung can xac nhan theo tiet dien day dan, cap luc cang va phuong phap lap dat.

items.name: Kep song song / kep noi nhanh
items.summary: San pham tham khao trong tai lieu: kep chu C JC-41C.
items.features: Dien tro tiep xuc thap, dan dien tot va ket noi nhanh on dinh.
items.material: Kich co va vat lieu xac nhan theo tiet dien day dan va ban ve du an.
items.application: Dung cho noi day, dau nhanh va nang cap luoi phan phoi.
items.packing: Please contact us for technical details.
items.customers: Phu hop nha thau EPC, don vi thi cong luoi phan phoi va nha phan phoi vat tu dien.
items.details: Cac mau kep song song khac co the cung cap theo nhu cau du an.

items.name: Kep tiep dia xuyen cach dien
items.summary: San pham ket noi tiep dia cho day boc cach dien.
items.features: Giam thao tac boc vo, lap dat nhanh hon va ket noi tiep dia tin cay.
items.material: Vo cach dien voi ket cau xuyen kim loai va ket noi tiep dia.
items.application: Ket noi tiep dia cho day boc cach dien, tiep dia tam thoi va ho tro lam viec tren duong day.
items.packing: Please contact us for technical details.
items.customers: Don vi thi cong va bao tri duong day phan phoi.
items.details: Thong so cuoi cung can xac nhan theo cap dien ap, tiet dien day dan va muc dich su dung.

items.name: Bien bao an toan & bien ten thiet bi
items.summary: Bao gom bien thu tu pha, bien PVC, bien men su, bien hop kim nhom, bien FRP va bien inox 304.
items.features: Nhan dien ro rang, dung ben ngoai troi va ho tro noi dung canh bao tuy chinh.
items.material: Catalogue hien thi tuy chon PVC, men su, hop kim nhom, FRP va inox 304.
items.application: Canh bao an toan dien, nhan dien thiet bi va quan ly an toan cong truong.
items.packing: Dong goi: 100 cai / bao det, 500 cai / thung carton.
items.customers: Dien luc, nha thau, doi bao tri va nha phan phoi.
items.details: Ho tro noi dung tieng Viet / tieng Anh, mang phan quang, in UV, in lua va kich thuoc tuy chinh.

items.name: Mu bao ho thong dung
items.summary: Co tuy chon vat lieu ABS va soi thuy tinh. ABS gom kieu chu V, mot gan co thong gio va mot gan khong thong gio.
items.features: ABS: nhe va chong va dap. Soi thuy tinh: do cung cao hon va vo ben.
items.material: Nhua ky thuat ABS hoac nhua gia cuong soi thuy tinh.
items.application: Thi cong dien, bao tri duong day, bao tri ngoai troi va cong truong cong nghiep.
items.packing: Please contact us for technical details.
items.customers: Doi thi cong dien, doi bao tri va mua sam theo du an.
items.details: Vat lieu soi thuy tinh khong phan loai ma rieng trong catalogue.
